'''taforo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:llamacide|llamacide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:llamacide|llamacide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| taforo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæfereth|tæfereth]] || [[word:tæferej|tæferej]] || [[word:tæferesh|tæferesh]] || [[word:tæfere|tæfere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tafoforoth|tafoforoth]] || [[word:tafoforoj|tafoforoj]] || [[word:tafoforosh|tafoforosh]] || [[word:tafoforo|tafoforo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:taforoth|taforoth]] || [[word:taforoj|taforoj]] || [[word:taforosh|taforosh]] || [[word:taforo|taforo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tafofroth|tafofroth]] || [[word:tafofroj|tafofroj]] || [[word:tafofrosh|tafofrosh]] || [[word:tafofrof|tafofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:taforotho|taforotho]] || [[word:taforojo|taforojo]] || [[word:taforosho|taforosho]] || [[word:taforoko|taforoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:taforoth|taforoth]] || [[word:taforoj|taforoj]] || [[word:taforosh|taforosh]] || [[word:taforo|taforo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:taforothol|taforothol]] || [[word:taforojol|taforojol]] || [[word:taforoshol|taforoshol]] || [[word:taforokol|taforokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:taforothotho|taforothotho]] || [[word:taforojojo|taforojojo]] || [[word:taforoshosho|taforoshosho]] || [[word:taforoko|taforoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:taforothon|taforothon]] || [[word:taforojon|taforojon]] || [[word:taforoshon|taforoshon]] || [[word:taforokon|taforokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:taforothoro|taforothoro]] || [[word:taforojoro|taforojoro]] || [[word:taforoshoro|taforoshoro]] || [[word:taforokoro|taforokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
